category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a random SQL query generator; official GitHub README describes SQLsmith as a random SQL query generator for PostgreSQL, SQLite, and MonetDB testing.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses SQLsmith; source_facts.name is sqlsmith.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains description, build, usage, and options; the official GitHub wiki is linked from the README for score/resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/anse1/sqlsmith; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes generated SQL workloads for RDBMS testing and lists supported PostgreSQL, SQLite, and MonetDB targets; GitHub topics include postgresql, fuzz-testing, sqlite3, and monetdb.
